title: gladiolus massonii
intro: Gladiolus massonii, also known as the 'Mountain Gladiolus', is a species of flowering plant in the Iridaceae family. Native to the eastern Himalayas and southern China, Gladiolus massonii has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Gladiolus massonii can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
